creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Muhammad Moinur Rahman from comment #1)

> If you are running from a VM image
Yes, I'm running from the VM disk image (not CD-ROM).

> please try to disable DMA of the HDD detected mostly for ATA or ATAPI.
I've tried to google how to do this and failed.  Gentoo and Ubuntu wikis also do not tell how to disable DMA.  Do do I do it?  Do I have to patch QEMU source code and rebuild it?
